items.text: A Gray Crested Gull grabs the Star Flakes from you by surprise and flies away, hovering above your head and mocking you.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: According to the information I've looked up, aside from Star Flakes, other fried foods are also very appealing to them.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: As the Gray Crested Gulls enjoy stealing others' food, they are also known as "Pirate Gulls".

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Yes. They are frequently spotted around "wharves" and places where potato fries are sold.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Why is the module freezing? I'd better uninstall it for now. Seems like there is no storage on your Pangu Terminal.
Xuanyin uninstalls the Bird Language Translation Module from your Pangu Terminal and transmits the related data back to her.

items.speaker: Xuanyin
items.text: Ah-choo, ah-choo, I need to hurry back and warm myself up. See you next time.
